top_signals.title: Taiwan Vows Not to Be ‘Silenced’ After China Expels NYT Reporter
top_signals.summary: Taiwan has condemned the expulsion of a New York Times journalist from China over an interview the US-based newspaper conducted with the self-ruled island’s leader, saying it is common for a president of a democratic country to explain its position.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals to list on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: The company currently has no active projects but aims to secure a portfolio of seabed mining concessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Glencore, Gentile back historical Irish region project sporting 3.3% zinc, 10% lead
top_signals.summary: Fueled by the C$12 million raised in March, Group Eleven has more than tripled the size of its planned drilling program for PG West.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
